correct_answer: Black holes captivate scientists and the general public.
retrieved_context: BLACK HOLES The Schwarzschild radius defines the size of a black hole SCHWARZSCHILD RADIUS. BLACK HOLES General relativity's breakdown at the singularity of black holes indicates the need for new physics to describe these phenomena GENERAL RELATIVITY. BLACK HOLES Hawking radiation is a phenomenon associated with black holes, predicting their ability to emit radiation and eventually evaporate HAWKING RADIATION. BLACK HOLES Black holes contain a singularity at their center SINGULARITY. BLACK HOLES Black holes are formed from the remnants of massive stars that have undergone a supernova explosion STARS. BLACK HOLES Black holes cause gravitational time dilation due to their immense gravitational pull GRAVITATIONAL TIME DILATION. GENERAL RELATIVITY Quantum gravity is speculated to extend the principles of general relativity to provide a more complete description of black holes QUANTUM GRAVITY. HAWKING RADIATION The prediction of Hawking radiation leads to the black hole information paradox, as it suggests information could be lost when black holes evaporate BLACK HOLE INFORMATION PARADOX. HAWKING RADIATION Hawking radiation was predicted by Stephen Hawking, linking his work directly to this phenomenon STEPHEN HAWKING. BLACK HOLES Quantum gravity is sought to explain the phenomena of black holes beyond the scope of general relativity QUANTUM GRAVITY. BLACK HOLES The event horizon surrounds the singularity at the center of a black hole EVENT HORIZON. BLACK HOLE The information paradox is directly related to the nature of black holes and the fate of information that falls into them. INFORMATION PARADOX. BLACK HOLE The study of black holes has contributed to new ideas in string theory. STRING THEORY. BLACK HOLE The holographic principle is a concept developed from the study of black holes, challenging traditional views on information storage. HOLOGRAPHIC PRINCIPLE. BLACK HOLE Black holes serve as a unique testing ground for the theories of general relativity. GENERAL RELATIVITY. BLACK HOLE The detection of gravitational waves was evidence of black holes' existence, resulting from the merger of two black holes. GRAVITATIONAL WAVES. BLACK HOLE The study of black holes has inspired new ideas in quantum mechanics. QUANTUM MECHANICS. GENERAL RELATIVITY Quantum gravity is speculated to extend the principles of general relativity to provide a more complete description of black holes QUANTUM GRAVITY. HAWKING RADIATION Hawking radiation was predicted by Stephen Hawking, linking his work directly to this phenomenon STEPHEN HAWKING. HAWKING RADIATION The prediction of Hawking radiation leads to the black hole information paradox, as it suggests information could be lost when black holes evaporate BLACK HOLE INFORMATION PARADOX. GENERAL RELATIVITY Quantum gravity is speculated to extend the principles of general relativity to provide a more complete description of black holes QUANTUM GRAVITY.
